stories.headline: What was the Iran nuclear deal Trump dumped in search of ‘better’ terms?

stories.headline: Rabbi accused of war crimes selected for Israel’s national celebration
stories.summary: Rabbi Avraham Zarbiv has filmed himself demolishing Palestinian buildings in Gaza while reciting religious verses.

stories.headline: Israeli soldiers and settlers kill 11 Palestinians across Gaza, West Bank

Nick Corasaniti, a politics reporter, explains the role Virginia’s new map is playing in the nationwide redistricting battle and its potential implications for the midterm elections.
